## Definition of Done (09 §9)
- [ ] Traces to a requirement (`docs/02` FR-* / `docs/05`)
- [ ] Meets coding standards (`docs/07`); analyzers / lint / format pass
- [ ] Validation, logging, exception handling present (no skips)
- [ ] Unit / integration tests written and passing (`docs/10`)
- [ ] Architecture tests pass (Dependency Rule intact)
- [ ] Security rules satisfied (`docs/06`); no secrets committed
- [ ] Audit entries produced where required
- [ ] Docs / OpenAPI updated where relevant
- [ ] CI green
